jsonLd.title: MyGlamm is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with MyGlamm! We are hiring a E-commerce Executive for our Vijayawada team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About MyGlamm:
MyGlamm is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MyGlamm!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
